chapter_title.en: Chapter on Eating and Drinking From Gold and Silver Utensils and Other Etiquettes of Eating

text: 4252 - وَ رَوَى سَمَاعَةُ بْنُ مِهْرَانَ قَالَ : كُنْتُ آكُلُ مَعَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فَقَالَ "يَا سَمَاعَةُ أَكْلاً وَ حَمْداً لاَ أَكْلاً وَ صَمْتاً".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4252 - Sama'ah bin Mehran narrated:
I was eating with Abu Abdullah (as), and Imam (as) said:
"O Sama'ah, eat with gratitude and praise, not with eating and silence."
